response.original_title: Riot! Rebel With A Cause (Astro Originals)
response.overview: This tells the fictional story of a band called Langkah Mayat that plays protest music to voice justice for victims of injustice on their campus. Their lead singer, Sal, who is a victim of sexual harassment by her lecturer, along with her fellow activists Feeqi, Kristy and Wid, aim to perform their songs to raise awareness about sexual harassment. However, each member has their own story and a dark past. In their pursuit of justice, they face various surprises and dark secrets that test not only their friendship, but also their true selves. Through a narrative filled with emotion and drama, taboo issues such as sexual harassment and victim silencing are explored in depth, particularly the impact and effects on the victims.
response.title: Riot! Rebel With A Cause (Astro Originals)
